item.title:
clubber: Clubber @clubber · 4min This week's fixtures on #ClubberTV
We've got Minor and U20 hurling and football action coming
item.description:
Clubber @clubber · 4min This week's fixtures on #ClubberTV
We've got Minor and U20 hurling and football action coming up, along with Munster and Leinster Senior Camogie Championship
Tune in ONLY on http:// Clubber.ie OfficialCorkCamogie y 9 más 1 70

item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 11min Forgot in the chaos to post these on Sunday night! Tyrone ratings from Sunday's game
item.description: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 11min Forgot in the chaos to post these on Sunday night! Tyrone ratings from Sunday's game. Conn Kilpatrick obviously stood out but thought Cormac Quinn and Joey Clarke were both superb as well De irishnews.com 163

item.title:
SmallerFishGAA: Smaller Fish @SmallerFishGAA · 12min This is a better angle of the Cregg Red
This is more shrugging off a marker than a
item.description:
Smaller Fish @SmallerFishGAA · 12min This is a better angle of the Cregg Red
This is more shrugging off a marker than any elbow. Kind of a 'get your hands off me' thing we've all done
Defender didn't flinch
If that's a red I'll eat my hat Cita TsuDhoNim @TsuDhoNim · 12 abr. Was the red for the elbow swing? Or something that came after? 6 1 mil

item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 25min Kerry, Derry & Donegal open their Christy Ring Cup campaigns with wins Kerry made an impres
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 25min Kerry, Derry & Donegal open their Christy Ring Cup campaigns with wins Kerry made an impressive start with a big win over Meath in Trim. Derry overcame Roscommon with 14 men, and Donegal impressed against Wicklow. Kerry GAA y 5 más 1 1 889
